notes: Tier 3c: Lean 4 / Mathlib formalization of the BDG-kernel actualization-rate construction. Defines BDGProfile (the integer count vector at depths 1-4), bdg_action (using the c_BDG = (1, -1, 9, -16, 8) coefficients shared with RA_BDG_Coefficient_Arithmetic), accepts predicate (S > 0, decidable), and actualization_rate := Gamma_cand * P_acc. Proves: zero profile accepted (S = c_0 = 1); worked accept/reject examples at depths 1-4; bridge limit (P_acc = 1 ⇒ rate = Gamma_cand); strong-suppression limit (P_acc = 0 ⇒ rate = 0); vanishing-environment limit; bilinearity in (Gamma_cand, P_acc); monotonicity in each argument; non-negativity; upper bound rate ≤ Gamma_cand for P_acc ∈ [0, 1] (formalizes that BDG can only suppress, never amplify). Probability-theoretic content (P_acc as a measure-theoretic acceptance probability over Poisson-CSG profile distributions) is left abstract; P_acc is treated as a real parameter in [0, 1]. Lifts Tier 3b from CV to LV for the arithmetic / algebraic content. Tier 3d (probability-theoretic closure) remains open.

notes: Tier 3d (interface): measure-theoretic acceptance probability. Lifts P_acc from the abstract real parameter of Tier 3c to a function (Measure BDGProfile -> R) using Mathlib MeasureTheory. Defines: BDGProfile as a discrete measurable space (top sigma-algebra); acceptingSet := {p | accepts p}; P_acc_measure m := m acceptingSet (in ENNReal); P_acc_real m := (P_acc_measure m).toReal. Proves: acceptingSet is measurable; P_acc_real is non-negative; P_acc_real <= 1 for any IsProbabilityMeasure; the trivial saturation point (P_acc_measure (Measure.dirac BDGProfile.zero) = 1; P_acc_real same = 1); composition with Tier 3c actualization_rate at the saturation point recovers gamma_cand; bounded actualization rate for any probability measure (rate <= gamma_cand). Scope: does NOT construct the joint Poisson-CSG product measure for given mu (deferred to Tier 3e).

notes: v2 primary-literature review of decoherence-channel budgets across 12 experimental scenarios (split by protocol_variant). Schema additions: split BB into self+environmental; split photon_recoil into spontaneous_emission + laser_phase_noise; split vibration into seismic+technical; add unknown_fraction and channel_additivity_caveat fields.
